introSection: Animal Race is a steel spinning indoor roller coaster currently located at Fun Oasis in Riyadh, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: A onride recorded in 2015 shows the ride's cars being unable to spin. It isn't known if it has been fixed since.

fullText:
Animal Race is a steel spinning indoor roller coaster currently located at Fun Oasis in Riyadh, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

A onride recorded in 2015 shows the ride's cars being unable to spin. It isn't known if it has been fixed since.

Blue track and red supports.
